message:
feat: add profile cloning to preserve login sessions and bookmarks

- Clone Chrome's Default profile by default (preserves cookies, history, extensions)
- Add --profile <name> to clone specific profile
- Add --no-profile to start with fresh profile
- Add --browser-path <path> to specify browser executable
- Add --list-profiles to show available Chrome profiles
- Improve Chrome not found error with helpful options
- Clean up temp user data dir on exit
